notes.sg-infectious-disease-respiratory-syndro: Pluralizing for consistency with other syndromes.
notes.sg-infectious-disease-severe-acute: Too generic, likely covered by 'severe acute respiratory syndromes'.
notes.sg-infectious-disease-infectious-disease: Singular is more common for a topic.
notes.sg-infectious-disease-syndrome-coronavir: Too similar to other coronavirus topics and potentially redundant.
notes.sg-infectious-disease-coronavirus-infect: This is a good specific topic.
notes.sg-infectious-disease-influenza-a-virus-: Capitalizing for proper noun and standard naming.
notes.sg-immune-system-acquired-immune-system: Relabeled to 'adaptive immune system' for standard terminology.
notes.sg-immune-system-respiratory-tract: Added 'immunity' to clarify the context within the immune system.
notes.sg-immune-system-multicellular-organism: Too general for a specific topic under 'immune system'.
notes.sg-escherichia-coli-klebsiella-pneumonia: This is a different species of bacteria, not a subtopic of E. coli research.
notes.sg-staphylococcus-aureus-methicillin-res: This is a specific type of antimicrobial resistance in staphylococcus, which is already covered by another topic.
notes.sg-staphylococcus-aureus-antimicrobial-r: This is a more general topic that covers methicillin-resistant staphylococcus aureus.
notes.sg-staphylococcus-aureus-skin-infection: This is a specific type of staphylococcal infection, which is already covered by another topic.
notes.sg-staphylococcus-aureus-staphylococcal-: This is a more general topic that covers skin infections caused by staphylococcus.
notes.sg-staphylococcus-aureus-dermatology-and: The label is missing the word 'and'.
notes.sg-cell-biology-extracellular-vesicle-in: This is a sub-topic of extracellular vesicle.
notes.sg-cell-biology-dna-repair-mechanisms: This is a sub-topic of dna repair.
notes.sg-cell-biology-homology-directed-repair: This is a sub-topic of dna repair.
notes.sg-cell-biology-nucleotide-excision-repa: This is a sub-topic of dna repair.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-disease-burd: Add 'studies' for consistency with other labels.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-systematic-g: Add 'studies' for consistency with other labels.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-the-global-b: This is a good label, but 'global burden of disease' is more common.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-trauma-and-e: Too specific and not directly related to the core concept of global burden of disease in microbiology.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-cost-effecti: This is a relevant metric for disease burden.
notes.sg-global-burden-of-disease-quality-adju: This is a relevant metric for disease burden.
